review: MANUAL-VERIFICATION Stage 3 §5 adversarial FINAL-CLASS review (NF-007 + NF-008)

evidence.fail_before_nf007_9e8daf1: 2 NF-007 tests FAIL on 9e8daf1: KeyError 'needsResume' (no empty-state; insights fell back to operator). Isolated at NF-007's parent.
evidence.fail_before_nf008_5bd9168: NF-008 test FAILS on 5bd9168: assert 200 == 422 (fit-scorer still scored against operator, not refused). Isolated at NF-008's parent.
evidence.independent_comprehensive_probe_016de70: Fresh no-resume user: fit-scorer 422 (no fitScore persisted) | insights 200 needsResume=True scored=False overall=0 matchedSkills=[] | cover-letter 422 | email 422 | tailor 422 + GET /resumes==[] | QUOTA runsUsed None->None (no charge) | ALL 5 surfaces clean of operator PII (DESHPANDE/+61 433 224 556/ATO/sarkar.vikram/vikramd LinkedIn).
evidence.no_silent_charge_mechanism: fitScorer is unmetered (absent from _LLM_TIER_BY_BACKEND={tailor,coverLetter,storyExtractor,emailAgent}), so _record_run sets quota_repo=None and never reserves; require_user_resume_text raises MissingResumeError before the job loop -> _execute_reserved_run except-path finish('failed')+_refund_once (no-op, nothing reserved) + re-raise -> main.py 422. No reservation, no charge. Empirically confirmed: quota runsUsed unchanged.

per_check.note: NF-007 empty-state: jobs._build_insights and cover_letters.cover_letter_insights now call resolve_user_resume_text(user_id, allow_operator_fallback=False); a no-resume caller gets _empty_insights (HTTP 200, needsResume=True, scored=False, matchedSkills=[], skillsMatched=0, overall=0, resume-derived dimensions zeroed; only resume-independent salary/location/stability signals shown) / cover_letter_insights adds needsResume + drops the operator voice corpus. Degrades to empty-state (200), NOT 422 (read-only) as required. Independently reproduced fail-before on 9e8daf1 (KeyError needsResume). Zero operator content in probe + tests.

NF-008 fit-scorer refuse + no charge + no score: fit_scorer.run uses require_user_resume_text -> MissingResumeError -> 422 'Add your resume' BEFORE the job loop, so no operator-derived fitScore is ever computed or persisted (GET /jobs shows all fitScore None; no job-list badge). No silent charge: fitScorer is unmetered (no reservation), and the _execute_reserved_run failure path refunds any reservation regardless; quota runsUsed unchanged (None->None) in the probe. Independently reproduced fail-before on 5bd9168 (200 not 422).

Comprehensive no-operator invariant HELD for a fresh no-resume user across EVERY surface: outbound cover-letter/email/tailor all 422-refuse; internal job-insights + cover-letter-insights honest empty-state (needsResume); fit-scoring 422-refuse. No operator PII (name/phone/email/employer/LinkedIn) in ANY response body; no operator skills surfaced as matched (matchedSkills=[]); no silent charge on the metered/refused surface. Verified by independent probe.

No regression to prior-PASS'd fixes: targeted suite's test_mv_resume_grounding.py (all 14 — the 9-path user-scoping, outbound-refuse, ensure_base_resume seeding fix) passes @016de70; mechanics tests (test_fit_scorer_agent, and test_gap_p7_discovery_001 / test_mv_j_correctness updated to seed_own_resume JORDAN) pass; test_cover_letter_studio (letterhead no-operator) passes. Internal story-extractor keeps the sanctioned MV-story-bank-006 fallback (resolve_user_resume_text default, untouched).

Test-honesty maintained: NF-007/008 tests use _register_fresh_user (no-seed identities) + _OPERATOR_PII_MARKERS (current DESHPANDE/+61 433 224 556/ATO/sarkar.vikram markers). The cover_letter_insights test seeds FIXTURE_LLM_RESUME_TEXT (JORDAN) then wipes grounding via update_sections({}) to simulate a no-grounding state — a legitimate edge, not operator-seeding. Mechanics operator-seed remains confined to the tailor-replay tests and stays cleanly separate from PII assertions.

No prohibited patterns in the delta (no Math.random/@ts-ignore/eslint-disable/--no-verify/skip/xfail); no node_modules; main.py UNCHANGED in this delta and the @app.exception_handler(MissingResumeError)->422 handler is intact @016de70. Additive/backward-compat: new needsResume/scored fields, new _empty_insights branch, fit_scorer swaps resolve->require; no DB migration, no public-signature break.

class_completeness: The cross-account operator-PII leak CLASS (NF-final-B-001/002/005/006/007/008 + MV-cover-letter-studio-006) is COMPLETE for fix/mv-resume-grounding @016de70: every user-facing/outbound path grounds on the caller's own resume; outbound + fit-scoring refuse (422) for no-resume users with no charge; internal analytics degrade to an honest empty-state; the operator PDF is never seeded as a user's base; the only surviving operator fallback is the internal story-extractor (sanctioned MV-story-bank-006).
supersedes_context: Follows the 9e8daf1 PASS (fix-mv-resume-grounding-9e8daf1-reverify.json) and the 29f4cc9 FAIL (fix-mv-resume-grounding-29f4cc9-review.json).
